headline: Apple expands American manufacturing program with four new partners
summary: Apple is adding Bosch, Cirrus Logic, TDK, and Qnity Electronics to its American Manufacturing Program, committing $400 million through 2030.

headline: Strength Seen in Corning (GLW): Can Its 8.4% Jump Turn into More Strength?
summary: Corning (GLW) was a big mover last session on higher-than-average trading volume. The latest trend in earnings estimate revisions might help the stock continue moving higher in the near term.
